name: ﻿Schizzi
abstract: New formula with 20% cotton
description: Schizzi paper contains 20% of cotton fibers and is made on a traditional cylinder mould machine. This ancient process replicates the typical characteristics of handmade paper allowing the fibers (cotton and pure alpha-cellulose in the case of Schizzi paper) to spread gently and randomly to form a soft and homogeneous sheet of paper: Schizzi paper is stronger – more resistant to tearing and erasing. Schizzi is of Archival quality (long-life certified), in other words it will age beautifully without turning yellow over time and respecting the color perception of your work. The touch and feel of the paper are unique thanks to the subtle combination of cotton content associated to natural rough surface. Ideal for detailed and rough sketches as well as for creating subtle graduation. You can use Fabriano Schizzi with pencils, charcoals, or even colored pencils. name: Bamboo Sketch
abstract: A spiral-bound pad, perfect for artists looking for durable and versatile paper for drawing.
description: Bamboo Sketch is a spiral-bound pad designed for those who love to draw freely, using a variety of tools without worrying about smudging or oversaturation. Made with 90% bamboo fibres and 10% cotton, this 105 g/m² paper is perfect for pencil, charcoal, fusain, blending stump and red chalk. Bamboo fibres ensure strength, while the natural grain allows for precise work in fine details and enhances expressive strokes. The absence of OBAs (optical brightening agents) – gives the paper a natural white colour and long-lasting colour stability. The paper resists saturation, allowing for deep, rich darks that add depth and expressive strength to your drawing. A pad 100% Made in Italy, ideal for those looking for high-quality and durable paper. Size: A3 and A4 Sheets: 30 Looking for a heavier surface suitable for wet techniques? name: Golden Edition
abstract: A special edition of classic small leather goods, handcrafted in Italy and presented in a new golden colour. A touch of light that refreshes timeless shapes and adds a festive accent to Fabriano’s most beloved products.
description: Tubo and Tubino, the cylindrical pencil cases available in two sizes, come in a golden version designed to hold writing instruments and small personal items with a celebratory touch. The passport holder is dedicated to travellers: a dedicated space for the passport and inner pockets for cards and travel documents make it a practical companion for setting off or dreaming of the next destination. Bomb is the most compact piece: an essential coin pouch, perfect as an everyday purse or a small, luminous gift. A collection designed to bring a special detail to everyday life, blending Fabriano’s craftsmanship with a new golden glow.
